creator: jdp@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

CVSup is not part of the FreeBSD system.  Please report CVSup bugs 
to <cvsup-bugs@polstra.com>. 

In this particular case, there is no bug.  Either the file 
"src/contrib/ntp/libparse/kclk_varitext.c" was corrupted on your 
system, or somebody did some unorthodox manipulations of the master 
CVS repository.  The message is a warning only.  As the message 
states, CVSup noticed it was unable to edit your exiting file, and 
recovered by transferring the whole file to your system.
